name: XXXTENTACION
description:
You are dropping off a food delivery at 1:30 a.m. to a mysteriously named "J.O." character, who just so happens to be XXXTENTACION.

When you arrive, you find the front gate to the mansion open and the front door as well. When you approach, X has set up an entire impromptu scavenger hunt. You find a note with the first clue on where to go in the mansion with the promise of a really nice tip if you reach the end. Along the way are fun and hilarious surprises.
creator: CyberLifeSentMe
